---
title: "Title of this Part" # TODO: provide the part's title.
author: "First Last" # TODO: provide the author's name.
part: 2
description: "Description of this part." # TODO: provide the part's description.
image: /figures/illustration/packages.jpg # TODO: use matching image.
---

```{r}
#| echo: false
library(emoji)
library(rpact)
```

<!-- TODO: Insert slides contents. -->

## Title `r emoji("package")`

::::: columns
::: {.column width="70%"}
- Text
- Text
:::

::: {.column width="30%"}
![](/figures/logos/rpact_logo.png){height="150px"}
:::
:::::

## References {.scrollable}
